description: Aggressive performance optimization to achieve cold start <=20ms, memory <=10MB, response time <=10ms, TPS >=1000

dispatches.task: Replace TUI Textual framework with lightweight curses implementation, target <2MB memory footprint
dispatches.verify_cmd: python3 -c 'import psutil, subprocess; p = subprocess.Popen(["python3", "-m", "tui"], stdout=subprocess.DEVNULL); import time; time.sleep(1); mem = psutil.Process(p.pid).memory_info().rss / 1024 / 1024; p.terminate(); exit(0 if mem < 10 else 1)'

dispatches.task: Implement lazy import system for all packages using importlib, defer heavy dependencies until actually needed
dispatches.verify_cmd: python3 -c 'import time; start = time.time(); import tui.app; cold = (time.time() - start) * 1000; exit(0 if cold < 20 else 1)'

dispatches.task: Rewrite crypto-lib with async operations, connection pooling, and cipher context caching for 1000+ TPS
dispatches.verify_cmd: python3 -c 'import asyncio, time, crypto_lib.core as crypto; async def test(): start = time.time(); tasks = [crypto.async_encrypt(b"test", b"key" * 8) for _ in range(100)]; await asyncio.gather(*tasks); duration = time.time() - start; exit(0 if duration < 0.1 else 1)'; asyncio.run(test())

dispatches.task: Eliminate runtime path resolution in gateway, pre-compute all import paths during build
dispatches.verify_cmd: python3 -c 'import time; start = time.time(); import gateway.server; cold = (time.time() - start) * 1000; exit(0 if cold < 5 else 1)'

dispatches.task: Replace JSON metrics with binary format, implement async batched collection with <1ms hot path overhead
dispatches.verify_cmd: python3 -c 'import time, metrics.collectors.performance_collector as pc; start = time.time(); pc.record_metric("test", 1.0); overhead = (time.time() - start) * 1000; exit(0 if overhead < 1 else 1)'

dispatches.task: Analyze import dependencies across all packages, identify and eliminate circular dependencies causing initialization delays
dispatches.verify_cmd: python3 -c 'import ast, os; files = []; [files.extend([os.path.join(r,f) for f in fs if f.endswith(".py")]) for r,ds,fs in os.walk(".")]; circles = sum(1 for f in files if "import" in open(f).read() and any(pkg in open(f).read() for pkg in ["euxis-core", "euxis-gateway"])); exit(0 if circles == 0 else 1)'

dispatches.task: Implement performance regression testing suite with automated benchmarking for cold start, memory, response time, and throughput
Validate all performance optimizations maintain functional correctness and security properties
